# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `QR-001`
- Title: `Enforce CI quality gate baseline`
- Requirement: [`QR-001`](../requirements/QR-001.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Maintainer`
- Value statement: `For maintainers, deliver enforceable CI quality gates to achieve stable merges and early defect detection.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `CI runs build, typecheck, lint, and format checks on PRs.`
  - `Required checks are configured as merge-blocking in repository settings.`
  - `Failure messages are visible and actionable in CI output.`
- Dependencies: `OR-001 deployment flow, OR-TOOL-001 toolchain baseline.`
- Validation approach: `CI pipeline validation on sample failing/passing PRs.`
- Priority score: `93`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/QR-001.md`](../requirements/QR-001.md)
  - ADR: `adr/0001-static-first-baseline.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
